scope: Authored Eevee surface reconstruction on the exact GN-VM mesh. This object contains no slicer data or G-code toolpath.

geometry.role: The graph derives dowel length and direction from the supplied mesh line, then applies diameter, midpoint, cutter, round-square, and cutter-offset controls.

capture.environmentInterpretation: The same measured studio.exr orientation and intensity used by the standalone Dowel Generator are reused because both assets evaluate the identical proc_ mahogany.003 material.

recoveredGraph.baseColor: The active HSV/Reroute branch resolves to black.

interpretation: The mesh-line-driven variant now reuses the same recovered mahogany graph as the standalone Dowel Generator rather than falling back to a generic gray material. All 1,778 evaluated faces retain the authored assignment, the silhouette aligns at 0.9713 IoU with 0.55-pixel corner RMSE, and both surfaces have complete mutual one-pixel coverage. The remaining dark reflection and bump placement differences are Eevee/Three.js raster and environment-filtering residuals; pixel identity is not claimed.
